arts.ttl: Celtic draw 'hard to take' says Docherty, proud boss can't fault Dundee's character
arts.sum: Tony Docherty was "so proud" of his depleted Dundee squad.

arts.ttl: 'Weak as p***' - Unseen X-rated Brendan Rodgers response to sloppy Celtic defending
arts.sum: 'Weak as p***' - Unseen X-rated Brendan Rodgers response to sloppy Celtic defending.

arts.ttl: Celtic ‘fan’ Aaron Donnelly panned over Dundee goal celebration as star offers explanation for reaction
arts.sum: The defender netted what he thought would be the winning goal late on and refused to show any joy

arts.ttl: 'He has to be braver...' James McFadden slams Celtic duo during 3-3 draw at Dundee
arts.sum: Adam Idah and Paulo Bernardo criticised as Celtic draw at Dundee “This should be, without a doubt, it should be a goal, Idah has to be braver (following a low cross from Kyogo which Idah missed),” said McFadden.

arts.ttl: Arne Engels rescues Celtic at the death as Dundee denied historic victory in epic Dens Park ding-dong - 3 talking points
arts.sum: It was a Tayside thriller as six goals were shared in a classic Premiership encounter

arts.ttl: 'Absolutely stunning...' Chris Sutton wowed by Celtic star after 3-3 draw at Dundee
arts.sum: Chris Sutton hails Luke McCowan as Celtic draw 3-3 at Dundee Sutton rightfully pointed out that ‘I can’t remember McCowan having a bad game in a Celtic jersey’, as he told Sky Sports Football (14/01/25).

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers brands Celtic ‘weak as p***’ as raging reaction to Dundee defending caught on camera
arts.sum: Rodgers was clearly less than impressed at his team';s attempt to defend a Dark Blues corner

arts.ttl: Arne Engels denies Dundee at the death as Celtic salvage point
arts.sum: It was the third time the William Hill Premiership leaders had dropped points inside a month.

arts.ttl: Dundee vs Celtic referee and VAR for Scottish Premiership tie
arts.sum: Dundee vs Celtic referee and VAR ahead of Scottish Premiership tie.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers names Celtic starting XI to take on Dundee
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers names Celtic starting XI to take on Dundee.
